chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2593 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 17.03.2025 Mr. Khadim Hussain Khuharo, Addl: P.G. Sindh ------------------------------------ None present for applicant. Progress report has been furnished by the trial Court, which reflects that charge has been framed and one witness has been examined by the trial Court and now the case is fixed for recording evidence of remaining witnesses on 20.03.2025. Since no one is in attendance, same was the position on the last two dates of hearing viz. 11.02.2025 and 24.02.2025, therefore, instant criminal bail application is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
